examples: An inmate learns to ride a unicycle in the prison gym seriously.
After all, who could look at a chimpanzee on a unicycle and comprehend its real situation?
As if just riding a unicycle didn't look funny enough, add mallets and balls and you've got a truly wacky spectacle.
All of me wants to rush in and hold her hand and hold the fickle unicycle for her.
Sometimes it feels like we walk and chew gum and juggle on a unicycle all at the same time.
